description: Add a slide to an unpacked .pptx directory by duplicating an existing slide (e.g. slide2.xml) or instantiating a slide layout (e.g. slideLayout2.xml). Wires up [Content_Types].xml, presentation.xml.rels, and prints the <p:sldId> to add to presentation.xml.
rules: stdlib-only (re, shutil, pathlib) — no third-party deps
SLIDE_SOURCE ending in slideLayoutN.xml creates a blank slide from that layout; any other slideN.xml duplicates it
mutates UNPACKED_DIR in place; the printed sldId line is captured to add_slide.txt under record_store
usage: Set UNPACKED_DIR (an unpacked .pptx dir) and SLIDE_SOURCE (slideN.xml or slideLayoutN.xml). Output: add_slide.txt.
limitation: Operates only on an already-unpacked directory (run the unpack perk first). Does not edit presentation.xml itself — it prints the sldId element for you to insert.
